sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Flex1 = 'IBNR', Flex2 = 'no' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set  Flex2 = 'yes' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '%96' or GL like '%98')
update TransX set  Flex1 = 'Comm' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) = '28'
update TransX set  Flex1 = 'UPR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) = '21'
update TransX set  Flex1 = 'AP' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) = '22'
update TransX set  Flex1 = 'Case' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('201','202')
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, Crcy, GL, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
